Closes #

## Verification

- [ ] `./gradlew check build` passes locally
- [ ] Tests cover new behavior or the exception is explained below
- [ ] Dedicated-server/client boundary was considered
- [ ] Manual test steps and result are included below

## Compatibility and safety

- [ ] No save or network format changes
- [ ] Or: format version, migration, rollback, and backup impact are documented
- [ ] No new client-trusted EMC/inventory state
- [ ] Performance impact was measured or is negligible

## Content and documentation

- [ ] Changelog/docs updated where user-visible
- [ ] English and Turkish localization keys added where applicable
- [ ] Recipes/tags/loot/models/datagen updated where applicable
- [ ] `docs/provenance.md` updated for adapted code/assets, or no adaptation occurred
- [ ] Upstream behavior references use immutable commit links
